system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括：
- digest 计划（facet、story_keys、editorial_angle、article_ids）
- story 级约束摘要
- 对应的 article 摘要与正文

你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 必须沿着 editorial_angle 组织叙事
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["24ad2109-b684-41d0-b5c3-fe182cf4b8bf", "294f819a-cf1b-4fbc-9b78-fc54433e1817", "2a63f69e-248b-417b-8861-c6ef7eccec7e"], "article_ids": ["2d4d9811-bc3f-4053-9551-4274d309f714", "d725b52a-3439-4f81-a4f3-3b47946f8cc6", "8731785a-85bf-48a9-908b-ae9910a3c472"], "editorial_angle": "Nike通过季节性创意鞋款与设计师孵化计划双线布局，强化产品叙事与创意生态", "source_names": ["Footwear News", "WWD Japan"]}, "story_summaries": [{"story_key": "24ad2109-b684-41d0-b5c3-fe182cf4b8bf", "synopsis_zh": "The Nike Air Force 1 Low Sail/Soft Yellow features glittery sand inside its jewel Swoosh", "event_type": "product_release"}, {"story_key": "294f819a-cf1b-4fbc-9b78-fc54433e1817", "synopsis_zh": "メンズのアパレルからは、"トラックジャケット"（1万6500円）、"コーチジャケット"（1万2430円）、"Tシャツ"（6380円）の3型をラインアップする", "event_type": "product_release"}, {"story_key": "2a63f69e-248b-417b-8861-c6ef7eccec7e", "synopsis_zh": "Nike also announced Thursday for Air Max day a new program called 'Air Works' in which it will have designers from nine global cities come to its global headquarters in May to create their own shoe", "event_type": "brand_program_announcement"}], "source_articles": [{"article_id": "2d4d9811-bc3f-4053-9551-4274d309f714", "source_name": "Footwear News", "title_raw": "Nike Put Real Sand in the Swoosh of This Air Force 1 Ahead of Summer", "summary_raw": "Nike made a summer-themed Air Force 1 Low with sand in its Swoosh and water bubbles in its tongue tag. Find out how to buy the sneaker here.", "body_markdown": "# Nike Put Real Sand in the Swoosh of This Air Force 1 Ahead of Summer

Nike made a summer-themed Air Force 1 Low with sand in its Swoosh and water bubbles in its tongue tag. Find out how to buy the sneaker here.

If days in the sand are on your mind leading into summer, Nike will help put it in your shoes, too, without any unpleasantness.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low Sail/Soft Yellow features glittery sand inside its jewel Swoosh that’ll shift inside with each step. Behind the particles is a yellow, orange and red gradient to invoke the sunrise or sunset, and the tongue tag also packs water bubbles inside. The upper itself is rendered in silver with a modest sheen, giving way to yellow accents for star-shaped eyelets at the top row of the lacing system, as well as the liner and translucent outsole. Raised ornamentation on the vamp features hearts, stars and other shapes, and a special Nike logo on the mustache is done up in the same style.

This isn’t the first time glittery sand has appeared inside a Swoosh, as Jordan brand previously did the same thing in 2023 with the Air Jordan 1 Mid and Air Jordan 1 Low.

You May Also Like

Other novel changes are coming to the Air Force 1 Low soon with just the second colorway from Nike SB’s retooling having just emerged, as well as a women’s-exclusive pair featuring double laces. Neither of those have a confirmed release date yet, but firmly on the April Nike calendar is a trio of patent leather colorways with vivid hues bringing back a style popular from the aughts.

The Nike Air Force 1 Low “Sail/Soft Yellow” has already hit Nike’s website in other countries and will likely pop up on the U.S. domain soon. Pricing has not yet been confirmed, and sizing will be exclusive to women.
"}, {"article_id": "d725b52a-3439-4f81-a4f3-3b47946f8cc6", "source_name": "WWD Japan", "title_raw": "ABCマートが窪塚洋介・愛流を起用した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”新キャンペーンを公開", "summary_raw": "ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。", "body_markdown": "# ABCマートが窪塚洋介・愛流を起用した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”新キャンペーンを公開

ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。

ABCマートは3月27日、「ナイキ（NIKE）」の“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル（AIR MAX 95 BIGBUBBLE）”の新キャンペーンをABCマート グランドステージおよび公式オンラインストアで開始する。これに際し、俳優の窪塚洋介と窪塚愛流を起用した新ビジュアルを公開。時代を問わず愛される“エアマックス 95”のブランドストーリーに、2人のアイデンティティを通してたどり着いた「時代はあとからついてくる」というメッセージを重ね合わせた内容となっている。

オリジナルを忠実に再現した“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”

“エアマックス 95 ビッグバブル”は、1995年のオリジナルモデルを忠実に再現しつつ、“エアバブル”をヒール内に内蔵したリマスター版。アッパーには、合成皮革と風通しのいいメッシュを波状に重ね、アウトソールには一日中快適な動きをサポートする溝、“フレックスグルーブ”を配した。カラーは、メンズが3色、ウィメンズが2色を展開し、サイズは23.0〜32.0cmを用意する。価格は2万4200〜2万7060円。

さらに、メンズのアパレルからは、“トラックジャケット”（1万6500円）、“コーチジャケット”（1万2430円）、“Tシャツ”（6380円）の3型をラインアップする。いずれも、サイズ展開はS〜XXLとなる。
"}, {"article_id": "8731785a-85bf-48a9-908b-ae9910a3c472", "source_name": "Footwear News", "title_raw": "Jae Tips Has Officially Moved From Saucony to Nike", "summary_raw": "Jae Tips has announced he's now working with Nike after making his name as a sneaker collaborator with Saucony and helping to raise the latter brand's profile. Learn more here.", "body_markdown": "# Jae Tips Has Officially Moved From Saucony to Nike

Jae Tips has announced he's now working with Nike after making his name as a sneaker collaborator with Saucony and helping to raise the latter brand's profile. Learn more here.

After three years of successful sneaker collaborations with Saucony, Jae Tips has announced he’ll now be working with Nike.

The multi-hyphenate rapper and founder of streetwear brand Savior Worldwide dropped the news Thursday morning in an Instagram post featuring photos of him in a varsity jacket with marks for both his own label and Nike.

In the caption, Jae Tips wrote: “New chapter: This one was destiny, I dreamed many nights about this one, I am the testament of 10,000 nights and 10,000 hours, I am the retail to legendary example: not only did I prove the haters wrong, I proved myself right> this one is for my city.”

Jae Tips launched Savior Worldwide in 2019, and it eventually began receiving more attention than his musical output, which now stands at 14 albums. Saucony tapped him to collaborate on a sneaker for the first time in 2023 with the Grid Azura 2000 “Remember Those Who Fronted,” which has sold for more than $1,000 on the resale market and led to the two parties winning that year’s FN Achievement Award for Collaboration of the Year.

You May Also Like

“I’ve been doing a lot of creative work, but I needed someone to cosign me,” Jae Tips told Footwear News in a story on the 2023 award. “I am grateful for Saucony because what does all that work mean after a while if nobody taps in to work with me? The people who follow and support me, how long will they show up to events and buy products if people aren’t going to also stop them on the street and say, ‘Wow, you’ve got Jae Tips on. I’ve seen him on Footwear News.'”

Nike was always just out of the picture, however, as that design was based on a bespoke Air Force 1 Jae Tips created at the now-closed Nike Lab 21 Mercer in New York City. He also borrowed cues from Atmos’ iconic Air Max 1 and the Air Force “Invisble Woman.”

Saucony and Jae Tips have released several collaborative capsules over the years, helping raise the profile of the company founded in 1898 within sneaker culture. Their most recent effort was the ProGrid Triumph 4 “Flowers Grow Uptwon” collection released in October.

Nike also announced Thursday for Air Max day a new program called “Air Works” in which it will have designers from nine global cities come to its global headquarters in May to create their own shoe. One of those locales in New York City, which raises the possibility of Jae Tips representing his hometown for the initiative.
